title: psoralea annua
intro: Psoralea annua is a flowering plant species, also known as Chinese knotted marigold, belonging to the Fabaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate the thyroid gland and enhance the immune system. The health benefits of Psoralea annua include its potential to treat hypothyroidism, improve skin conditions, and reduce inflammation, as well as its antioxidant properties. Psoralea annua is typically prepared as a tea or infused in oil for use in herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
